display_name: SWING LATCH (paper A/B, 2026-07-03): ride serial swingers. Market-only sim (216 traction tokens, cached minute bars): deep-swing entries taken only AFTER a won swing on the same token = +4.09 gross/swing (~+1.5 net of measured 2.6pp live round-trip), stable across time+token splits (+3.9..+4.3 all four) — but per-TOKEN mean is only ~+0.5 because the edge concentrates in a minority of serial swingers. The streak_latch flag is the concentrator: drop a token permanently on its FIRST losing leg; winning legs keep re-entry open (reentry_cooldown_secs=0). Entry = deep swing (pc_h1<=-35) + family demand gates; exits approximate the winning sim cell (TP +25 / stop -12 / ~90min timestop) with a runner tail (TP2 +40). Judged vs badday_flush control at n>=30 distinct tokens, scrubbed per-token. Enforce-bar: per-token mean >= +2 over >= 5 days like every live-slot candidate.
